title: Disable conversion of impure logical expressions to bitwise expressions
body:
It fixes https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/487.
It disables the conversion of `&&` and `||` to `&` and `|` when their RHSs have side effects. Such conversion is correct when only LHS has side effects, so I enabled it.

I got rid of `isTPure` function. It should do the same what `isPure` does. I added/fixed the implementations of `isPure` in most frequent nodes.

The implementation of `isPure` method of `AstNodeFTaskRef` was wrong. It returned `true` only for DPI-imported functions. Such functions may have side effects, but we can't check it during Verilation, so in their case we should assume that they aren't pure. We should also check arguments for being pure. For now I changed the implementation to treat all function calls as impure.
